allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "===MOST-MODIFIED FILES \(top 20\)==="; git log --pretty=format: --name-only | Where-Object {$_ -ne ""} | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Count,Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path lib\\config\\api_keys.dart\) { Write-Output "api_keys.dart EXISTS \(build will succeed\)"; \(Get-Content lib\\config\\api_keys.dart | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines } else { Write-Output "api_keys.dart MISSING - chatbot build will FAIL" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== ASSET SIZES ==="; if \(Test-Path assets\) { Get-ChildItem -Recurse assets | Select-Object Name,@{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize }; Write-Output "=== serviceAccount.json content type \(is it a real key?\) ==="; \(Get-Content serviceAccount.json -TotalCount 4\))
